description: Ray ban is firmly placed on the unconventional side of luxury. Made in Italy with the best craftsmanship and materials, this fashion forward option is the epitome of style.  We recommend these D& G sunglasses as the ultimate choice for staying in-vogue without compromising on superior quality.The glasses come in a felt lined, leather case with branding embossed on the lid, fabric pouch included to protect the sunglasses.Lens width: 60 mmLens colour: BlackFrame colour: Black and copperGuarantee: One yearTinted lens with 100% UV protectionRecommended for high brightness conditionsStylised shaped metal and acrylic frameD& G branding in silver colour on black acrylic armsFlexible hinges for FitFlexible pads made of rubber to hold the glasses in place, ensuring there is no friction with the skinCareClean your D& G glasses with mild soapy waterPolish with a soft cloth to remove dustRefrain from using strong cleaning agents which may affect the optical properties of the glassesKeep in the original case in a dry place at a temperature between -10° C and +35° C
